sealed_by: Codex /root; packet-required single worker; no subagents

scope.axis: F03 P6 C4 raw-DXF canonical-world reconstruction probe only

source_of_truth.f03_band_verbatim: INSERT 전개가 적격 def 중 ≥30%에서 신규 cross-scope pair를 생성 (최소 3/10)
source_of_truth.zero_rule_verbatim: 0건이면 현 코퍼스에서 world-assembly 이득 주장 금지 (인프라 PASS와 별도 판정)

pair_selection_rule.handle_normalization: trim ASCII whitespace and uppercase hexadecimal handle text; empty/null handles are excluded
pair_selection_rule.consensus_wall_handle: the same normalized handle is present in wall_line_handles for at least 3 distinct annotation sources for the same (unit_id, def)
pair_selection_rule.eligible_definition: a unique (unit_id, def) with at least one consensus wall handle that maps exactly to a raw-DXF block name and whose handle resolves to a supported non-degenerate primitive in that block
pair_selection_rule.trial_order: sort eligible definitions by UTF-8 byte order of unit_id, then def; take the first 10 without replacement
pair_selection_rule.placement_domain: all modelspace-reachable INSERT placements of annotation-eligible definitions in the sealed raw DXF
pair_selection_rule.candidate_pair: two placed consensus wall segments with different source_def_handle values; at least one segment belongs to the trial definition; both placements share the modelspace root
pair_selection_rule.witness_choice: among successful candidates for a trial definition, choose the lexicographically smallest canonical (placed_uid_a, placed_uid_b); one witness maximum per trial definition
pair_selection_rule.no_outcome_adaptation: no reselection, threshold tuning, fallback annotator, or alternate ordering after metrics are computed

world_pair_predicate.unit_resolution: use raw DXF $INSUNITS to derive millimetres per drawing unit; if absent/unitless/unmapped, predicate status is UNKNOWN_UNIT_SCALE and cannot count as success
world_pair_predicate.local_scope_status: UNKNOWN_SCOPE_INCOMPARABLE for cross-definition local coordinates; local coordinates are never compared as if they shared a frame
world_pair_predicate.new_pair_definition: a cross-definition relation that is UNKNOWN before assembly and TRUE only after both segments are mapped into the common modelspace world frame

required_all: both source handles and source definition handles exactly match raw DXF and annotation consensus
both placed endpoint pairs match the independent tools/e2/detect/insert_expand.py plus normalize.py raw-DXF expansion for the identical source handle and insert path
maximum absolute endpoint-coordinate error <= 1e-9 * max(1, absolute coordinate extent of the compared endpoint set)
no UNKNOWN field participates in the success
reconstruction_success.arrays: if an array placement cannot be uniquely aligned to the independent reference expansion, mark UNKNOWN_REFERENCE_ARRAY and do not count it as success
reconstruction_success.unsupported_or_ambiguous: preserve as UNKNOWN with reason; never coerce to PASS or FAIL

decision_rule.band_pass: exactly 10 eligible trial definitions are decidable and at least 3 have a reconstruction-success witness; success_rate >= 0.30
decision_rule.below_band: 10 trials are decidable but fewer than 3 reconstruction-success witnesses; prohibit a world-assembly benefit claim while keeping infrastructure PASS separate
decision_rule.blocked_input: the allowed inputs cannot supply 10 eligible trials or cannot supply at least 3 constructible cross-scope witness pairs; report BLOCKED_INPUT with the available counts
decision_rule.unknowns: UNKNOWN rows do not enter the numerator; if they prevent the required decidable trial/pair counts, status is BLOCKED_INPUT
